title: Doom III BFG Documentation
summary: id Software developer Jan Paul Van Waveren (a.k.a Mr Elusive) send me his technical notes about Doom 3 BFG. I was especially interested in the "Compute vs. Memory" section which confirms that CPU are now so fast that it is often better to calculate something than fetch it from RAM. Jan Paul was also kind enough to share a list of all the publications relate…
content:
id Software developer Jan Paul Van Waveren (a.k.a Mr Elusive) send me his technical notes about Doom 3 BFG. I was especially interested in the "Compute vs. Memory" section which confirms that CPU are now so fast that it is often better to calculate something than fetch it from RAM.

Jan Paul was also kind enough to share a list of all the publications related to idTech4 engine (see bottom of this page).


More...
